purpose: Monitoring companion app for DENG Tool: Rejoin
changelog: Fish It: rod and fish images render from real DB/CDN URLs (CSP allows rbxcdn; home page shows rod images).
Fish It: exact catch counts (2,095 not 2.1K) on website and APK.
Dashboard: Interval shows configured monitor refresh (e.g. 30s), not hardcoded 5s.
Monitor: connection TTL scales with refresh interval so devices stay connected while bridge heartbeats.
Bridge: push interval follows APK app_refresh_interval_seconds from server settings.
Website: live APK download count below the download button.
Agent: deng-rejoin doctor versions, monitor restart, improved monitor snapshot-test --upload-probe.
